title: CAM Director Kushal Ramotre joins JSA as a Partner
description: CAM Director Kushal Ramotre has joined JSA Advocates & Solicitors as a Partner in Corporate practice.Ramotre is a 2013 graduate of University of Mumbai.He has over 12 years of experience in corporate transactions, including M&A, private equity investments, strategic partnerships and cross-border deals. He has advised on several marquee transactions across sectors such as infrastructure, renewable energy, technology, financial services and healthcare. His experience includes advising Mavc
